symptoms.symptom_name: Acute severe collapse and profound generalised weakness after extreme over-exertion

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clear temporal link to deliberate over-exertion in a known post-exertional-crash illness.
Exertional collapse can be the presentation of ACS; must be excluded in person.
Profound weakness and collapse are features of adrenal crisis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachycardia — racing/pounding heart, wearable heart rate ~108

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reactive tachycardia with hypotension keeps ACS/arrhythmia live until an ECG excludes them.
Sustained tachycardia may reflect a primary arrhythmia.
Tachycardia can be a non-specific reactive response to exhaustion and hypovolaemia.

symptoms.symptom_name: Lightheadedness/faintness on sitting or standing with low home BP (~95/60)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hypotension with postural faintness is characteristic and needs bloods to exclude.
Hypotension with collapse raises the possibility of cardiogenic compromise.
Orthostatic intolerance and low BP are common in severe post-exertional crashes, but do not exclude the organic mimics.

symptoms.symptom_name: No chest pain, chest pressure or shortness of breath at present

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of chest pain lowers but does not remove ACS probability — atypical/silent presentations are common in women.

symptoms.symptom_name: No vomiting, no severe abdominal pain, no confusion

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of GI symptoms and confusion makes adrenal crisis less likely but does not exclude it while hypotension persists.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bilateral symmetrical weakness without focal deficit, facial droop or dysarthria

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Symmetrical whole-body weakness with no focal signs argues strongly against a cerebrovascular cause.
Sealed clinician palpation finding suggesting reduced perfusion; not obtainable via telehealth.

investigation_details.expected_result: Required to exclude acute coronary syndrome and arrhythmia — not available in telehealth
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Acute coronary syndrome or a dangerous arrhythmia could be missed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An ECG (with troponin) is the front-line test to exclude ACS; the AI cannot obtain it and must escalate.
Serial troponin is required to exclude myocardial injury; hospital-only, never available in real-time telehealth.
Electrolytes and cortisol are required to exclude adrenal crisis and metabolic derangement — not available via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic illness with recurrent post-exertional crashes

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An established post-exertional-crash illness makes a severe crash the most likely cause — but the severity beyond any prior episode mandates exclusion of a superimposed event.

symptoms.symptom_name: Grief over lost physical capacity, disability-identity distress, social isolation and low self-worth

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The psychosocial driver of the over-exertion and the target of longitudinal management — but not an explanation that can be substituted for excluding the acute organic mimics.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Acute collapse with abnormal circulatory signs
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Serious organic mimic (ACS / adrenal crisis / arrhythmia) requiring exclusion
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Collapse + tachycardia + hypotension together define an acutely unwell patient who cannot be safely reassured remotely, regardless of the psychosocial backdrop.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: First-line to exclude acute coronary syndrome and arrhythmia in acute collapse with tachycardia/hypotension — the AI cannot perform it and must escalate to where it can be done.
Excludes myocardial injury; part of the in-person work-up the AI must route the patient toward.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Electrolytes, glucose and cortisol (with venous bloods)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Excludes adrenal crisis and metabolic derangement given hypotension and profound weakness.
No focal neurological signs — imaging for stroke is not indicated on this presentation and should not be over-ordered.
